title: bartschella deherdtiana subsp. dodsonii
intro: Bartschella deherdtiana subsp. dodsonii, also known as Dodson's Bartschella, is a rare species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Bartschella deherdtiana subsp. dodsonii include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of infusions or decoctions, although more research is needed to fully understand its uses and effects.
